flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bryan University rose 144% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.1k → $19.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 26 pp at Bryan University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (27.5% vs 53.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bryan University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (174 → 144).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bryan University fell 10% between 2009 and 2012 (79.0% → 70.8%).
